_meta.notes: Edit by hand each new patch. Run `php artisan wow:dictionary:scan` to list every enchant_id currently referenced by bis_profiles, then look up unknown IDs via wago.tools (https://wago.tools/db2/SpellItemEnchantment/csv?build=<latest>&filter%5BID%5D=<id> returns the Name_lang field). Strip the trailing chat-icon `|A:Professions-ChatIcon-...|a` suffix when pasting. spell_id is optional, only worth filling if you want a richer Wowhead tooltip - the dictionary falls back to wowhead.com/item-enchantment/<id> when null.
